sections.title: Day 1 Recap — Basics of English
sections.hindiTitle: Day 1 का Recap — English के Basics
sections.explanation: SVO structure (Subject+Verb+Object), Simple Present tense, Do/Does questions, Pronouns, Articles (a/an/the) — यह सब Day 1 में सीखा।
sections.formula: Subject + Verb + Object | Do/Does + subject + base verb?

sections.title: Day 2 Recap — Self Introduction
sections.explanation: My name is / I am from / I work as — introduction के templates। Present Perfect Continuous से experience बताना।
sections.formula: My name is / I am from / I work as

examples.english: My name is Rohan, and I am from Delhi.
examples.hindi: मेरा नाम रोहन है, और मैं दिल्ली से हूँ।

examples.english: I have been working here for two years.
examples.hindi: मैं यहाँ दो साल से काम कर रहा हूँ।

sections.title: Day 3 Recap — Imperative Sentences
sections.explanation: Command (base verb से शुरू), Negative (Don't + base verb), Polite (Please + base verb), Let's (suggestion) — सब imperative sentences हैं।
sections.formula: Base verb (command) | Don't + base verb (negative) | Please + base verb (polite)

sections.title: Day 4 Recap — Be Verb
sections.explanation: Present: I=am, He/She/It=is, You/We/They=are। Past: I/He/She/It=was, You/We/They=were।

sections.title: Day 5 Recap — Demonstrative Pronouns
sections.explanation: This (singular, near), That (singular, far), These (plural, near), Those (plural, far)।

sections.title: Day 6 Recap — Has / Have
sections.explanation: I/You/We/They + have | He/She/It + has। Present Perfect: have/has + V3।

examples.hindi: उसने अपना काम खत्म कर लिया है।

sections.title: Day 7 Recap — Had
sections.explanation: Had = past possession के लिए सभी subjects के साथ। Past Perfect: had + V3।

examples.english: He had already left when I arrived.
examples.hindi: जब मैं पहुँचा, वह पहले ही जा चुका था।

sections.title: Day 8 Recap — Will Have
sections.explanation: Future Perfect: will have + V3। By + future time + subject + will have + V3।

examples.english: By tomorrow, I will have finished the report.
examples.hindi: कल तक, मैं report खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।

sections.title: Day 9 Recap — Use of There
sections.hindiTitle: Day 9 का Recap — Use of There
sections.explanation: There is (singular, present), There are (plural, present), There was/were (past), There will be (future)।

examples.english: There is a book on the table.
There were many people at the party.

sections.title: Mixed Practice Strategy
sections.explanation: अब जो भी sentence आए, पहले पहचानो कि कौन सा grammar topic इसमें है (be verb, have/has, had, will have, there, demonstrative, imperative)। फिर सही formula apply करो।
sections.formula: Identify topic → Apply correct formula → Check subject-verb agreement

examples.english: There are five students in the class, and they have completed the test.
examples.hindi: Class में पाँच students हैं, और उन्होंने test पूरा कर लिया है।ie mixed topics
